g.text: Download all data stored about you.
Your data is ready to download.
Remove all data we have stored.
You will be treated as a first-time visitor.
As a user exercising my GDPR rights, I need to export all data
the application has stored about me so that I can see exactly
As a user exercising my GDPR rights, I need to request deletion
of my data so that I can exercise my "right to be forgotten."
Data export functionality (GDPR Right of Access)
Data deletion request (GDPR Right to Erasure)
Export includes all locally stored user data
• Contains consent history, preferences, local data
